notes: People-search / data broker site. PRE-CALIBRATION scored 0.0 / UNKNOWN despite clear people-search purpose. WHOIS failed same list bug as spokeo. DV cert (292 days, no expiry concern). Tech stack: Magento + Cloudflare. Title clearly indicates people-search site. Post-calibration expected: ~40 pts (MEDIUM) — dv_cert(5) + cloudflare(5) + people_search(20) + platform_mismatch(10).
